_comment: Card name -> display hint. Activate labels include effect index (effect N) from engine. Values: fusion_materials, cost_send_ed, sent_to_gy, sent_to_gy_1, target_1/target_2/target_3 (show only first N selected). Append |draw_1 for '; draw 1'. Do NOT blanket multi-effect cards—use per-effect hints by effect index when needed. Materials shown with (x2) when same card twice.
